calibration_confidence.note: coarse proxy only, not a validated BODY-quality signal -- see runs/cal_body_projection_bias_20260702T014121Z/section_b_joint_asymmetry_explanation.json (95.3% of observed Burlington dy-bias is BODY's own joint-layout asymmetry, not calibration error; Wolverine's flat calibration shows a comparable mismatch). Do not gate/reject BODY output on this value alone.
